---
title: "Day 10: Final Project"
format:
  revealjs:
    slide-number: true
    incremental: true
    center-title-slide: true
    embed-resources: true
    theme: [default, ../../theme/dark.scss]
    logo: ../../theme/codercub.jpg
    highlight-style: dracula
    title-slide-attributes:
      data-background-gradient: "linear-gradient(135deg, #0a0e1a 0%, #0d2137 60%, #1a1f35 100%)"

---

## We've Covered A Lot!

- Working with data in Python using Pandas and Matplotlib
- Supervised ML using scikit-learn to create a regression model
- Trained models for physical hardware using the micro:bits
- Neural Networks and how computer vision works
- Generative models for creating text, structure, and images

# Wow, Great Job!

# What Will You Build?

## What Will You Build?

- Explore more datasets in Python **or**
- Re-train the micro:bits to build something more complex **or**
- Create a new game/app using computer vision **or**
- Use one of the generative models to create new content **or**
- Something completely different!

## Today's Class

- Starting now, for ~90 minutes, build your own project
- Create a new notebook (demo)
- Remember you can copy/paste code from other notebooks
- Ask for help if you need it! I'll float around the room
- After ~90 minutes, "show and share" (optional)
